G

GamePane - Class in view_controller
The GamePane class represents the main game interface for the Wordle game.
GamePane(WordleGame, AccountCollection) - Constructor for class view_controller.GamePane
Constructs a new GamePane with the specified Wordle game.
gameState - Variable in class model.WordleGame
 
getAccounts() - Method in class model.AccountCollection
 
getAchievements() - Method in class model.WordleAccount
Gets the achievements associated with the account.
getActiveAccount() - Static method in class view_controller.LoginPane
 
getAverageGuesses() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the average number of guesses per game.
getBestGame() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the best game (fewest guesses) score.
getCurrentWinStreak() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the current win streak.
getGame() - Method in class model.WordleAccount
Gets the current Wordle game instance associated with the account.
getGamesLost() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the number of games lost.
getGamesPlayed() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the total number of games played.
getGamesWon() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the total number of games won.
getGuessDistribution() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the distribution of guesses across games.
getLetter(int, int) - Method in class model.WordleGame
Retrieves the letter from the wordle game grid at specified row and column.
getLongestWinStreak() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the longest win streak.
getPassword() - Method in class model.WordleAccount
Gets the password of the account.
getState() - Method in class model.WordleGame
Gets the current state of the game.
getStatistics() - Method in class model.WordleAccount
Gets the statistics associated with the account.
getTotalGuesses() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the total number of guesses across all games.
getTurn() - Method in class model.WordleGame
Gets the current turn number in the game.
getUsername() - Method in class model.WordleAccount
Gets the username of the account.
getWinAtGuess() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the distribution of guesses across games.
getWinRate() - Method in class model.Statistics
Calculates and returns the win rate.
getWord() - Method in class model.WordleGame
get the current word
getWord() - Method in class model.WordRepository
Retrieves a new word from the repository to be used as the hidden word.
getWorstGame() - Method in class model.Statistics
Gets the worst game (most guesses) score.
guess(String) - Method in class model.WordleGame
Adds a guess to the game board and checks if it leads to a win.
